channel.title: Advanced Mechanix — Engineering Insights
channel.description: Insights on electrical drafting, BIM modeling, solar permitting, arc flash safety, and engineering outsourcing from the Advanced Mechanix team.

item.title: 2026 Offshore Engineering Rates Report
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Planning-rate benchmarks for electrical drafting, BIM modeling, solar permits, arc flash studies, and managed offshore engineering documentation in 2026.

item.title: California Solar Permit Pass-Rate Benchmark 2026
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: A practical benchmark for measuring commercial solar permit quality: first-submission pass rate, correction-cycle causes, AHJ notes, and production controls.

item.title: The True Cost of Timesheets Detached From Drawings
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Why engineering teams lose control when hours, drawing progress, approvals, leave, and planner records live in separate systems.

item.title: How to Brief an Offshore Drafting Team
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: The eight-part briefing pack, a 45-minute kickoff agenda, and the RFI protocol that gets the first offshore drawing issue back right instead of on revision three.

item.title: The IEEE 1584 Arc Flash Calculation, Explained Step by Step
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: The full pipeline from single-line to arc flash label: arcing current, clearing time, electrode configurations, the reduced-current check, and what changed from 2002 to 2018.

item.title: Case Study: A 38-Site Arc Flash Program for a Grain Network
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: IEEE 1584-2018 studies refreshed across an anonymized Australian grain network of 38 receival and port sites in nine months, staged around the harvest window.

item.title: Case Study: The Origin of Advanced Mechanix Timesheets
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: How Advanced Mechanix's internal drawing-led operating process became Advanced Mechanix Timesheets, a product for engineering and AEC teams.

item.title: Case Study: 25 MVA Mine Power Distribution Package
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: A remote mine power distribution and switchgear documentation package covering a 132/11 kV, 25 MVA substation and process plant loads.

item.title: Case Study: Commercial Riser & Panel Schedule Package
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: A 12-floor commercial tower electrical riser and panel schedule package delivered through BIM coordination, emergency power integration, and NFPA 70E documentation.

item.title: Case Study: Industrial MCC & Single-Line Diagram Package
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: How Advanced Mechanix delivered an industrial MCC and single-line diagram package two weeks early, catching five construction-phase conflicts before field mobilization.

item.title: Case Study: 120+ Commercial Solar Permit Packages
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Commercial rooftop solar permit packages across California AHJs with a five-day average turnaround and controlled correction-cycle tracking.

item.title: Case Study: BIM Transition Partnership
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: BIM production support, ISO 19650-aligned standards, and staff enablement without project delivery stalling.

item.title: Case Study: Mining Predictive Maintenance Pilot
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Historian analytics for conveyor motor failure modes, moved from four-week pilot to production maintenance workflow.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Outsourcing Electrical Drafting (2026)
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: A 2,500-word buyer's guide for engineering managers, BIM leads, and procurement officers evaluating offshore drafting vendors. Standards, security, SLAs, pricing benchmarks, seven red flags.

item.title: What Is a Single-Line Diagram?
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: An illustrated engineer's guide to the most-referenced drawing in electrical engineering. Symbols, standards, reading conventions, and common mistakes.

item.title: What Is NFPA 70E? Arc Flash Safety Explained for Engineers
item.dc:creator: Junaid Qazi
item.description: Plain-English guide to the US electrical safety standard. How it differs from NEC, arc flash risk assessment, PPE categories, employer documentation obligations.
